summary: Monster pacing is acceptable for MT1: the minimum exit route uses bat (6,11), blackSlime (3,3), and skeleton (5,1), giving a clear early/moderate/exit combat ramp without impossible fights. Optional branches add stronger threshold checks through zombie (3,5), zombie (11,3), skeleton (7,3), and skeleton (9,7), while weaker greenSlime placements are limited and not enough to collapse the floor into filler. No zone or repulse sources are present, so there is no special-damage route issue in this specialist scope.
